title: Replace HVAC air filter
description: Filter last changed 6 weeks ago. Unit running longer cycles and energy bill up 12%.

title: Schedule annual AC tune-up
description: Summer approaching, no tune-up in 14 months. Refrigerant levels unverified.

title: Seal ductwork leaks in attic
description: Visible gaps at two duct joints. Estimated 15-20% conditioned air loss.

title: Replace thermostat batteries
description: Low battery warning displayed. Unit defaulting to hold temperature.

title: Inspect furnace heat exchanger
description: Unit is 11 years old. Cracked heat exchanger is a CO leak risk.

title: Clean evaporator coil
description: Coil cleaning completed by contractor. System running efficiently.

title: Fix slow drain in master bath
description: Slow drain for 3 weeks, getting worse. Hair clog suspected.

title: Inspect water heater anode rod
description: Unit is 6 years old, anode rod never inspected. Premature tank failure risk.

title: Repair leaking exterior hose bib
description: Slow drip from backyard spigot. Foundation moisture risk if unaddressed.

title: Flush water heater sediment
description: Popping sounds from tank indicate sediment buildup. Last flushed 3 years ago.

title: Replace worn toilet flapper in hall bath
description: Toilet running intermittently. Flapper seal degraded. Wasting ~200 gal/day.

title: Reroute p-trap under kitchen sink
description: P-trap rerouted by plumber. No further leaks observed.

title: Replace tripping GFCI outlet in garage
description: Outlet trips randomly. Affects garage tools and chest freezer — food loss risk.

title: Install outdoor motion sensor light
description: Back porch has no lighting. Security gap identified after recent neighborhood incident.

title: Inspect panel for double-tapped breakers
description: Two breakers observed with dual wiring during last inspection. Fire hazard.

title: Replace flickering dining room fixture
description: Light flickers under load. Loose neutral or failing fixture suspected.

title: Add dedicated circuit for home office
description: Office running on shared 15A circuit with kitchen. Tripping under full load.

title: Replace outdated smoke detector wiring
description: Interconnected smoke detectors rewired to current code. Passed inspection.

title: Dishwasher not draining fully
description: Standing water after cycles. Getting worse over 2 weeks. Drain pump suspected.

title: Refrigerator ice maker stopped working
description: No ice production for 5 days. Water supply line valve confirmed open.

title: Dryer vent cleaning overdue
description: Last cleaned 18 months ago. Lint buildup confirmed — active fire hazard.

title: Microwave turntable motor failing
description: Turntable stopped rotating. Uneven heating. Motor replacement ordered.

title: Washing machine drum bearing worn
description: Loud grinding noise on spin cycle. Bearing failure will damage drum if unaddressed.

title: Range hood filter replacement
description: Filter replaced, grease buildup cleared. Exhaust flow restored.

title: Repair fence gate latch
description: Gate latch broken, gate swings open freely. Security and pet containment concern.

title: Caulk master bath shower
description: Grout and caulk cracking around shower pan. Moisture intrusion behind tile risk.

title: Touch up exterior paint on trim
description: Peeling paint on two window frames. Wood exposure will accelerate rot.

title: Clean gutters
description: Gutters clogged with debris from fall. Overflow causing fascia saturation.

title: Test smoke and CO detectors
description: Last tested 11 months ago. Two units showed weak response during informal check.

title: Reseal garage door weatherstripping
description: Bottom seal cracked and separated. Air and pest infiltration confirmed.
